title: Better With Time
description: Better Than Wolves / Better With Mods tech features brought to modern Minecraft
body:
![Better With Time Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c72d874885db15509345a185311572bee05db68b.png)

Better With Time is a **tech-focused** adaptation of the [Better Than Wolves](https://github.com/BTW-Community/BTW-Public) mod for modern versions of Minecraft (1.21+). Though not as direct of an inspiration, it also shares many similarities with [Better With Mods](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bwm-suite).

Better Than Wolves pioneered many technical blocks, items, and mechanics that overhauled the way players build, automate, and farm resources. Better With Time seeks to bring that classic, vanilla-adjacent, 2011-2012 experience to the modern Minecraft environment.

![A showcase of BWT's features with shaders installed](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RatherBeLunar/BetterWithTime/refs/heads/main/images/shaders_showcase.png)

## ⚙️Tech-Focused, not Hardcore

An important note: Due to changes to the mod and viral YouTube videos, Better Than Wolves, in recent years, has taken on a new identity of being a brutally challenging, early game survival experience first, tech mod second.
Better With Time does not, and will not ever replicate these features. It will not materially affect your ability to survive the early game.

Better With Time's design goals are entirely focused on delivering a satisfying, cohesive "Technical Minecraft" experience. There are all sorts of things you can do with the new blocks and mechanics, while still keeping that vanilla feel.

![A demo of mechanical power, the Turntable, and Block Dispenser](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RatherBeLunar/BetterWithTime/refs/heads/main/images/tech_demo_1.gif)

## 🐞 Beta

Better With Time has a ton of features already, and is fully playable in survival. However, features from classic Better Than Wolves are still being added. Bugs are still being fixed, and the game's balance is still being tweaked. Most importantly, additional documentation is on the way.

In the meantime, join the #better-with-time channel on the [Better Than Wolves Discord](https://discord.gg/WUtwPTws2f) to ask questions, talk about the mod, and report issues.

Better With Time also supports the [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) mod out of the box, and you can learn more about the survival progression by using it.
